title: SS Lurline
summary:
SS Lurline may refer to one of the following Matson Navigation Company ships:

SS Lurline (1908), later Alaska Packers Association ship Chirikof, served as USAT Chirikof during World War II
SS Lurline (1932), ocean liner
SS Lurline (1931), the former SS Monterey; named Lurline, 1963–1970
SS Lurline (2019), container ship
text:
SS Lurline may refer to one of the following Matson Navigation Company ships:

SS Lurline (1908), later Alaska Packers Association ship Chirikof, served as USAT Chirikof during World War II
SS Lurline (1932), ocean liner
SS Lurline (1931), the former SS Monterey; named Lurline, 1963–1970
SS Lurline (2019), container ship
